𝗪𝗛𝗢𝗦𝗧𝗛𝗘𝗥𝗘 | Discovering and visualizing devices on a local area network through an interactive terminal interface.  🔥 Super Hot!

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Discovering and visualizing devices on a local area network through an interactive terminal interface.
📅 Created: Aug 2025 • Updated: Feb 2026

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Interactive TUI
✅ Fast & Concurrent scanning
✅ No Elevated Privileges Required
✅ Device Enrichment (OUI lookup)
✅ Integrated Port Scanner
✅ Daemon Mode with HTTP API
✅ Theming & Configuration


⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 2K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 48 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 7 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

Whosthere is a Go-based Local Area Network discovery tool that uses an interactive Terminal User Interface (TUI) to help users understand their network. It employs multiple unprivileged scanning techniques like mDNS, SSDP, and ARP cache analysis, enriching discovered devices with manufacturer information (OUI lookups).

⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃⁃

🔗 𝗟𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦
• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/ramonvermeulen/whosthere

𝗛𝗢𝗠𝗘𝗛𝗨𝗕 | To provide a centralized, private, and easy-to-use dashboard for families to manage various daily utilities and information on their home network.  🔥 Super Hot!

HomeHub is a private, self-hosted, and lightweight web application designed to centralize family utilities. It offers a no-login, Progressive Web App (PWA) experience for managing shared notes, shopping lists, chores, media downloads, and more, all within your home network.

CyberPanel is a web hosting control panel powered by OpenLiteSpeed, designed to simplify server and website management. It offers a wide range of features for managing domains, emails, databases, security, and PHP versions, making it a comprehensive solution for hosting providers and developers.

𝗡𝗜𝗚𝗛𝗧𝗜𝗡𝗚𝗔𝗟𝗘 | To provide a powerful and flexible alerting engine for monitoring systems, processing and distributing alarms effectively, and integrating with existing data sources and visualization tools.  🌟 Rising Fast!

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a powerful and flexible alerting engine for monitoring systems, processing and distributing alarms effectively, and integrating with existing data sources and visualization tools.
📅 Created: Mar 2020 • Updated: Feb 2026

♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦♦

✅ Open-source alerting expert
✅ Connects with various data sources (VictoriaMetrics, ElasticSearch, etc.)
✅ Configurable alerting and notification rules
✅ AI assistant integration via MCP-Server for natural language interaction
✅ Recommended collector: Categraf
✅ Supports Prometheus Remote Write protocol
✅ Distributed deployment mode for edge data centers

Nightingale is an open-source alerting system designed to work with existing data sources, focusing on processing and distributing alarms. It complements visualization tools like Grafana by providing a robust alerting engine and supports distributed deployments for resilience.
